artPrompt: An ashen-robed human cleric campaigner stands earnest and unblinking on a dim doorstep at midnight, one hand raised mid-knock, the other clutching a blank folded pamphlet, a cold gold halo flickering behind their head. The looming clock tower rises in the blood-dark sky beyond the porch. The figure fills the lower-center of the wide frame, candlelight pooling at their feet. Wide 4:3 landscape, bone white and deep black, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Doorstep Evangelist
text:
When Doorstep Evangelist enters the battlefield, target opponent reveals their hand and you knock politely on the table three times.
Whenever a campaign, vote, or election happens at this table, you gain 1 life. The doomsayers canvass too.
flavorText: Will not leave until you take a pamphlet. The pamphlet is also a ballot.
